name: C & F FINANCIAL CORP
business: C&F Financial Corp provides community banking services including deposit accounts and loans, mortgage banking through origination and sale of residential mortgage loans, and consumer finance by purchasing automobile loans. It serves individuals and businesses in Virginia and surrounding states, and automobile loans in the Mid-Atlantic, Midwest, and Southern US.
sellsTo: mortgage borrowers in Virginia and surrounding states
automobile dealers and borrowers in Mid-Atlantic, Midwest, Southern US

exposures.sentence: competition from non-bank financial technology firms

We are evaluating potential use cases across all subsidiaries and departments for the prudent adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) including robotic process automation, generative and agentic AI, and machine learning tools.

catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the Board of Directors authorized a new program, effective January 1, 2026 through December 31, 2026, to repurchase up to $5.0 million of the Corporation s common stock (the 2026 Repurchase Program).
